name: Perfect Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in cold water.
2. Add the gelatin mixture, sugar replacement, and salt to hot water; stir until dissolved.
3. Add lemon juice, cucumber, carrots, and onion.
4. Beat cream cheese with mayonnaise until smooth.
5. Blend into vegetable mixture.
6. Pour into mold and chill.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 73
Source: The Complete Diabetic Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand
